headline: UBS Maintains Buy on EOG Resources, Lowers Price Target to $158
summary: UBS  analyst Josh Silverstein   maintains EOG Resources (NYSE:EOG) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $168 to $158.

raw.headline: UBS Maintains Buy on EOG Resources, Lowers Price Target to $158
raw.summary: UBS  analyst Josh Silverstein   maintains EOG Resources (NYSE:EOG) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $168 to $158.

headline: Jefferies Maintains Buy on EOG Resources, Raises Price Target to $175
summary: Jefferies  analyst Lloyd Byrne   maintains EOG Resources (NYSE:EOG) with a Buy and raises the price target from $170 to $175.
